tools.name: acoustic_fembem_activation_probability_gate
tools.title: Activation Probability Gate
tools.description: Checks sigmoid and softmax derivatives against finite differences, softmax shift invariance and normalization, and a saturation negative control.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_topology_information_gate
tools.title: Topology and Information-Geometry Gate
tools.description: Checks tropical distributivity, monotone component merging, manifold chart round trips, Fisher-metric positivity, and invalid-probability rejection.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_integrity_encoding_gate
tools.title: Integrity and Encoding Gate
tools.description: Checks a transparent chained-checksum tamper control and UTF-8 binary round trip while explicitly rejecting production-cryptography claims.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_tabular_transform_gate
tools.title: Tabular Transform Gate
tools.description: Checks string split/mid/find/left/right, sum/sumproduct/conditional/cumulative aggregation, and missing/empty negative controls for CAE tables.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_bayes_inference_gate
tools.title: Bayesian Inference Gate
tools.description: Checks Beta-Binomial conjugacy and normalization, MLE/MAP, seeded MCMC agreement and mixing, bounded R-squared, and invalid-prior rejection.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_time_series_gate
tools.title: Time-Series Gate
tools.description: Checks stable VAR recovery, impulse-response decay, Granger SSE gain, nearly white innovations, and unstable-process rejection.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_gradient_boost_gate
tools.title: Gradient-Boost Gate
tools.description: Fits readable residual stumps, checks monotone loss reduction and an excessive-step negative control, and withholds boosted predictions from solver truth.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_neural_ode_gate
tools.title: Neural ODE Gate
tools.description: Checks Euler convergence order, continuous-depth sensitivity against finite differences, invalid-step rejection, and an epsilon-delta control.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_tabular_lookup_gate
tools.title: Tabular Lookup Gate
tools.description: Checks exact and approximate lookup, INDEX/MATCH equivalence, sorted-key requirements, missing-key rejection, and deterministic joined identifiers for CAE tables.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_graphical_model_gate
tools.title: Graphical Model Gate
tools.description: Checks Bayesian-network normalization and conditional independence, Gaussian precision missing edges, sampled partial correlation, and cyclic-DAG rejection.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_sde_ito_gate
tools.title: SDE and Ito Gate
tools.description: Checks an Ito identity and isometry by seeded Monte Carlo plus analytic Black-Scholes price and PDE residual, with invalid-volatility rejection.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_cnn_architecture_gate
tools.title: CNN Architecture Gate
tools.description: Checks convolution shapes, depthwise-separable parameter reduction, zero-residual identity, SENet excitation bounds, and Inception channel concatenation.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_recurrent_sequence_gate
tools.title: Recurrent Sequence Gate
tools.description: Checks RNN/bi-LSTM sequence shapes, LSTM/GRU gate bounds, finite memory states, and an explicit exploding-recurrence negative control.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_latent_structural_gate
tools.title: Latent Structural Gate
tools.description: Checks hierarchical shrinkage, stable structural-equation covariance, unstable-SEM rejection, and categorical quantification coefficients before solver promotion.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_quantification_ii_gate
tools.title: Quantification II Gate
tools.description: Checks within/between covariance symmetry, generalized eigen-equation, normalized Lagrange constraint, and maximal discrimination ratio.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_factor_rotation_gate
tools.title: Factor Rotation Gate
tools.description: Checks orthogonal communalities, varimax-style rotation geometry, Promax oblique covariance preservation, factor correlation, and singular-rotation rejection.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_text_retrieval_gate
tools.title: Text Retrieval Gate
tools.description: Checks subword/document vectors and deterministic tf-idf/BM25 relevance ranking with empty-query rejection before using text retrieval for CAE knowledge.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_projective_geometry_gate
tools.title: Projective Geometry Gate
tools.description: Checks homogeneous scale invariance, invertible homography round trips, conic-incidence preservation, transformed-conic symmetry, and singular-map rejection.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_nlp_transformer_gate
tools.title: NLP Transformer Gate
tools.description: Checks normalized causal attention, no future leakage, ALBERT-style parameter sharing, pretrain/inference mask distinction, BLEU controls, sparse document vectors, and task-prefix contracts.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_quantification_gate
tools.title: Quantification III Gate
tools.description: Checks preference-table normalization, correspondence/SVD reconstruction, Lagrange eigen-equation, Rayleigh maximality, and finite row/column scores.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_hypothesis_test_gate
tools.title: Hypothesis-Test Gate
tools.description: Runs deterministic null/alternative controls for a known-variance z test, checks bounded p-values and threshold-based contradiction logic, and withholds statistical results from solver truth.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_transformer_scaling_gate
tools.title: Transformer Scaling Gate
tools.description: Checks power-law scaling recovery, causal sparse-attention structure, I/O-safe provenance, and withholding of unverified large-model extrapolations before CAE use.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_pca_covariance_gate
tools.title: PCA and Covariance Gate
tools.description: Checks covariance symmetry, orthogonal eigenvectors, PCA variance maximization, monotone reconstruction error, and covariance/correlation geometry.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_quantum_linear_gate
tools.title: Quantum Linear-Algebra Gate
tools.description: Checks unitary gates, state-norm preservation, a one-bit Deutsch constant/balanced control, nonunitary rejection, and end-to-end I/O cost before any CAE use.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_bellman_control_gate
tools.title: Bellman Control Gate
tools.description: Checks Bellman expectation and optimal fixed points, policy/value iteration convergence, Q-learning versus SARSA targets, n-step TD, on/off-policy importance ratios, and invalid discounts.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_spectral_linear_algebra_gate
tools.title: Spectral Linear Algebra Gate
tools.description: Checks SVD reconstruction and component formulas, orthogonal isometry, symmetric diagonalization, covariance SPD rejection, and multivariate-normal whitening.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_random_matrix_stability_gate
tools.title: Random-Matrix Gradient Stability Gate
tools.description: Propagates random orthogonal layer Jacobians and explicit expanding/contracting negative controls to detect deep-network gradient explosion or vanishing before CAE surrogate promotion.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_latent_distribution_gate
tools.title: Latent Distribution Gate
tools.description: Checks normalized generative priors, Bayesian identification posteriors, sampling frequencies, and forward-QoI evaluation for latent-variable CAE candidates.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_linear_inverse_gate
tools.title: Linear Inverse and SVD Gate
tools.description: Checks transpose shape, Moore-Penrose identities, least squares, TSVD rank handling, CCA bounds, and solver-promotion policy for CAE inverse problems.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_actor_critic_gate
tools.title: Actor-Critic and Policy-Gradient Gate
tools.description: Checks softmax policy normalization, REINFORCE gradient finite differences, actor-critic baseline variance reduction, eligibility traces, and finite DQN targets.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_a3c_async_gate
tools.title: A3C Asynchronous Worker Gate
tools.description: Checks asynchronous worker arrival order, on-policy version identity, bounded gradient staleness, explicit stale/off-policy rejection, and forward-solver promotion replay.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_policy_trust_gate
tools.title: CAE Policy Trust Gate
tools.description: Checks deterministic-policy gradients against finite differences, TRPO-style KL update limits, DDPG soft-target contraction, action bounds, and solver promotion.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_variational_geometry_gate
tools.title: Variational and Geometry Gate
tools.description: Checks KL nonnegativity, ELBO/evidence/free-energy identities, five equivalent free-energy forms, coordinate round trips, symplectic preservation, and a non-symplectic negative control.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_rl_stability_gate
tools.title: RL Stability Gate
tools.description: Checks prioritized replay probabilities and importance correction plus a Monte Carlo Double-DQN overestimation-bias control before CAE reward promotion.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_energy_model_gate
tools.title: Boltzmann/DBN Energy Gate
tools.description: Exactly enumerates a teaching RBM, checks probability normalization, likelihood-gradient finite differences, likelihood improvement, DBN layer handoff, and forward-solver candidate evaluation.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_dueling_cae_action_gate
tools.title: Dueling Network CAE Action Gate
tools.description: Checks Q=V+A decomposition for sequential CAE design: zero-mean advantage identifiability, state-offset invariance, invalid-action rejection, selected-action ranking, and independent forward-solver reward replay.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_vae_field_gate
tools.title: VAE CAE Field Gate
tools.description: Runs a readable linear VAE contract for CAE field snapshots: reconstruction, nonnegative KL, ELBO components, reparameterization-gradient finite-difference check, latent OOD control, and forward-QoI verification.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_gan_design_gate
tools.title: GAN CAE Design Gate
tools.description: Checks multi-mode coverage, a collapsed-generator negative control, held-out discriminator accuracy, and independent forward-solver acceptance before promoting GAN-derived CAE design candidates.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_alphago_cae_search_gate
tools.title: AlphaGo-Inspired CAE Search Gate
tools.description: Separates policy priors, value estimates, and PUCT-style tree search for a discrete CAE design fixture, then requires independent forward-solver verification against the exhaustive reference.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_nice_flow_gate
tools.title: NICE Flow CAE Design Gate
tools.description: Learns a reversible additive coupling for correlated CAE design variables, checks analytic and finite-difference Jacobians, likelihood improvement, exact round trip, OOD filtering, and forward-QoI replay.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_diffusion_inverse_gate
tools.title: Diffusion-Inspired CAE Inverse Gate
tools.description: Applies a monotone diffusion noise schedule to a reproducible ill-conditioned CAE fixture, performs truncated-modal least-squares denoising, and requires independent forward-operator residual improvement. Learned candidates are not ground truth.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_optimization_learning_gate
tools.title: MATLAB Optimization Learning Gate
tools.description: Audits gradient agreement (reference, central finite difference, complex step), shared Bayesian/GP uncertainty, SVD/TSVD/POD rank policies, reproducible bounded PSO/CMA-ES histories, and independent forward-solver replay.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_ml_cae_pipeline
tools.title: MATLAB CAE/ML Pipeline Gate
tools.description: Runs a reproducible CAE/ML teaching contract spanning schema, POD/SVD, Gaussian-process uncertainty, active learning, forward-solver verification, and VAE/normalizing-flow or reinforcement-learning toolbox preflight. Generated or learned candidates are never ground truth and require forward verification.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_check_result_manifest_file
tools.title: Acoustic FEM/BEM Check Result Manifest File
tools.description: Checks a script/MCP-ready acoustic FEM/BEM result manifest JSON file using acoustic_fembem.result_manifest_gate and prints a compact JSON verdict. Pass larger manifest data by file path, not as nested tool arguments.

manifest_path.description: Absolute path to the result manifest JSON file.

require_radia_version.description: Whether the manifest must include Radia or radia-mcp version provenance.

require_result_output_schema.description: Whether the manifest must include output table schema, columns, and units.

expected_result_output_schema_id.description: Expected result output schema id, or an empty string to skip this exact-match check.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_acoustic_gate
tools.title: Acoustic FEM/BEM Analytic Gate
tools.description: Runs the integrated Sugahara Lab acoustic FEM/BEM solver on a committed sphere/ball fixture and compares it to the analytic reference, printing a JSON verdict. kind = soft | rigid | coupled_invisible | coupled_fluid (vs the partial-wave series), focus_adjoint (reverse-mode adjoint AD gradient vs finite differences), radiation_force (acoustic radiation force from the BEM field vs the analytic series), fsi (fluid-structure interaction coupled solve: elastic interior FEM + acoustic BEM, stiff-limit vs the rigid sphere), fsi_dtn (the same FSI stiff-limit gate on the FAST spherical-DtN / radiating-impedance exterior, no dense BEM assembly), or thrust_adjoint (the elastic-bead wavefront-synthesis thrust adjoint through the FSI solve: radiation-force quadratic form vs a direct integral + Wirtinger gradient vs finite differences). Pure MATLAB (needs the Gypsilab repo on disk; no NGSolve). Acoustic waves use BEM/Sommerfeld/DtN/high-order impedance language, not Kelvin boundary language.

kind.description: Which acoustic case to solve and gate; focus_adjoint gates the adjoint-AD gradient vs finite differences, radiation_force gates the BEM radiation force vs the analytic series, fsi gates the elastic-sphere fluid-structure coupled solve (stiff limit vs the rigid sphere), fsi_dtn gates the same coupled solve with the FAST spherical-DtN / radiating-impedance exterior, thrust_adjoint gates the elastic-bead wavefront-synthesis thrust adjoint (force quadratic form vs direct integral + Wirtinger gradient vs FD).

tolerance.description: Relative-error pass band; pass a nonpositive value to use the per-kind default.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_crossval_gate
tools.title: Acoustic FEM/BEM Cross-Validation Gate
tools.description: Runs the integrated Gypsilab-readable acoustic FEM/BEM repository against the radia-ngsolve/NGSolve validation ladder using the same Netgen .vol tri/tet fixtures. kind = mesh_topology | galerkin_ngsolve | helmholtz_ngsolve | catalog_100.

fixture.description: Optional .vol fixture file name under fixtures/mesh_topology, e.g. unit_sphere_coarse.vol. Pass an empty string to use the per-kind default.

tolerance.description: Relative-error pass band; pass a nonpositive value to use the per-kind default.

write_log.description: Whether to let the underlying validation batch write its Markdown log.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_knowledge
tools.title: Acoustic FEM/BEM Knowledge
tools.description: Returns one topic of the integrated acoustic FEM/BEM knowledge (the Gypsilab readable lane): overview, spaces, galerkin_bem, coupled_fem_bem, multiphysics (the interface-is-the-battlefield coupling-difficulty synthesis, incl. non-conforming mesh coupling / mortar / supermesh), acoustic, public_acoustic_nonboundary_10, sonic_crystal, adjoint_ad, matlab_execution_policy, vol_visualization, pde_vol_bridge, radia_ngsolve_crossval, ngsolve_bem_50, catalog_100, vibroacoustic_drum, curved_vol_geometry, validation_discipline, optimization_link, all.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_vol_mesh_summary
tools.title: Acoustic FEM/BEM .vol Mesh Summary
tools.description: Summarizes a first-order Netgen .vol mesh for MCP/LLM preflight: point/triangle/tet counts, boundary orientation, bounding box, source digest, and viewer guidance. The path may be absolute, repo-relative, or a fixture file name under fixtures/mesh_topology.

vol_path.description: Absolute path, repository-relative path, or fixture file name such as unit_sphere_coarse.vol.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_cq_time_grid
tools.title: Acoustic FEM/BEM CQ Time Grid
tools.description: Validates the shared Lubich CQ grid contract: BDF1/BDF2, dt>0, M>=N contour samples, 0<rho<1, and Laplace nodes in Re(s)>0.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_cq_response_reality
tools.title: Acoustic FEM/BEM CQ Response Reality
tools.description: Validates a coupled CQ result summary: one solve per node, Re(s)>0, small residual, real interior/exterior reconstruction, and Johnson-Nedelec double-layer presence.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_adjoint_scaling
tools.title: Acoustic FEM/BEM Adjoint Scaling
tools.description: Validates reverse-mode acoustic BEM optimization across multiple design-variable counts: one adjoint solve per size, finite-difference agreement, affine forward residual, signed ascent direction, and monotone objective improvement.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_balanced_learning_profile
tools.title: Acoustic FEM/BEM Balanced Learning Profile
tools.description: Returns the ten-stage equal public/source MCP learning contract with baseline, controls, protocol smoke, and balance audit stages.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_hmatrix_scaling
tools.title: Acoustic FEM/BEM H-Matrix Scaling
tools.description: Runs the readable ACA+ Laplace single-layer H-matrix at three or more sizes, compares every matvec with a dense reference, and gates bounded rank plus subquadratic stored-entry growth.

point_counts_json.description: JSON array of at least three strictly increasing sizes, e.g. [60,120,240].

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_repository_health
tools.title: Acoustic FEM/BEM Repository Health
tools.description: Runs a lightweight pre-push health check for the integrated MATLAB acoustic FEM/BEM repository: MCP extension registrations, 100-case catalog, .vol fixtures, PDE Toolbox-to-.vol bridge presence, and old repository-name drift.

tools.name: acoustic_fembem_soft_sphere_cq_causality
tools.title: Soft-Sphere CQ Causality Gate
tools.description: Runs the readable P1 TD-BEM convolution-quadrature soft-sphere pulse and gates finite/real reconstruction, linear residual, and scattered-peak timing against the geometric ray arrival.
